formula_plain_text: Empirical coefficients for IEEE 1584:2018 incident-energy formula, 2700V model class (applicable 601 V – 2700 V). One coefficient set per electrode configuration.

coefficients._note: Coefficient values pending verification. Source: IEEE 1584:2018 Table 5 — 2700V model. Implementer should transcribe k1..k7 + x_distance_exponent from the standard or a cited published reference (e.g., ETAP application note, Bisson textbook ch. 5). Once transcribed, set verification_status to 'verified-against-source'.

worked_examples.source: IEEE 1584:2018 Annex D — 2300V system (approximate; verify when coefficients are transcribed)

license_note: Coefficient values are factual empirical fits from IEEE 1584:2018 — reproduced for interoperation. Currently null pending transcription.
